mapper.select:
select id, tenant_id, tenant_name, status, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by from batch.tenant
and (tenant_id ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or tenant_name ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
select id, tenant_id, tenant_name, status, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by from batch.tenant where tenant_id = #{tenantId} limit 1

select id, tenant_id, tenant_name, status, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by from batch.tenant where tenant_id in
#{t}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.tenant (tenant_id, tenant_name, status, description, created_by) values (#{tenantId}, #{tenantName}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: update batch.tenant set tenant_name = #{tenantName}, description = #{description}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
update batch.tenant set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
